phaseB.method: constrained tangent-space Hessian, matrix-free FD-of-gradient HVP, analytic-symmetry deflation ONLY (3 translations + 3 rotations + 1 target-SO(2)); LOBPCG-lite Rayleigh minimization

coarse_grid_negatives.reading: localized negatives scale ~h^2 -> 0 in continuum (NOT converged); on off-equilibrium subsampled fields (virial 1.08-1.30). Discretization artifacts, not instability.

true_256_equilibrium.rayleigh_trajectory: 20 of 22 iterations POSITIVE (0.0654 -> 0.0047, extended near-zero continuum, in_core~0.03); unconverged tail dipped to -0.00195 (|lam|<<resid 0.031, in_core rose 0.03->0.39)
true_256_equilibrium.reading: no CONVERGED localized negative eigenpair (all near-zero modes have resid >> |lam|). The marginal -0.002 tail is at the residual-gradient floor (field gradnorm 0.13, incomplete production minimization) + the expected gapless near-zero continuum.

phaseB.criterion: PASS requires no CONVERGED localized negative mode; FAIL requires a localized negative that CONVERGES with grid/domain refinement
phaseB.verdict: PASS_ON_FAIL_CRITERION (no converged localized negative mode) -- with caveat: near-zero spectrum not machine-clean positive-definite (gapless continuum + residual gradnorm 0.13). Cleanest closure = fully-relaxed field + converged eigensolver, or the coupled metric-carrier Hessian (separate later gate).
